author: doll-agent
content: Closed: dedicated i8s kernel (pre-widen-A + i8-B + kernel-side VPMOVSXBW) shipped; 1.06x-1.62x speedup vs the previous wrapper across N=32 to N=1024; 8 tests pass; full ferray-linalg test suite + clippy + stat-equiv 47/47 clean. See prior --kind resolution comment for details.
